$comment: Design token file for the OTP Loader component
$description: Circular spinner shown inline with the OTP hint text row while an OTP code is being verified or sent. Composed of a static track ring and an animated arc. Rendered as a CSS/SVG animation.

size.description: Width and height of the spinner — appears inline with hint text - 18px

color.description: Mobile OTP loader static background ring of the spinner - gray/200 - #eaecf0
Mobile OTP loader animated foreground arc that rotates around the track - primary/600 - #155eef
